paths.name: @/lib/db
paths.message: UI layer MUST NOT depend on Prisma/db; call a module use case instead

paths.name: @prisma/client
paths.message: UI layer MUST NOT depend on Prisma types

patterns.message: UI layer MUST NOT import a module's infrastructure; use the read facade (server-queries) or the module's *UseCases singleton

UI layer MUST NOT import a module's domain; use the read facade (server-queries), the *UseCases singleton, the module's public index barrel, or its client-safe client.ts barrel (pure domain re-exports only)

paths.name: @/lib/db
paths.message: App Router adapter MUST NOT import Prisma/db; call a module use case instead

paths.name: @prisma/client
paths.message: App Router adapter MUST NOT depend on Prisma types

patterns.message: App Router adapter MUST NOT import a module's infrastructure; use the read facade (server-queries) or the module's *UseCases singleton

App Router adapter MUST NOT import a module's domain; use the read facade (server-queries), the *UseCases singleton, the module's public index barrel, or its client-safe client.ts barrel (pure domain re-exports only)

paths.name: @prisma/client
paths.message: application layer MUST NOT depend on Prisma types; define ports and inject implementations from the composition root

patterns.message: application layer MUST remain framework-free (no Next.js/React)

paths.name: @/lib/db
paths.message: domain layer MUST NOT depend on Prisma/db

paths.name: @prisma/client
paths.message: domain layer MUST NOT depend on Prisma types

paths.name: server-only
paths.message: domain layer MUST remain framework-free (no server-only)

patterns.message: domain layer MUST NOT depend on Next.js/React
